texto: Of course, a single verse of the Holy Qur'an or a hadith moves the faithful to good actions, but volumes of books would not move an unwilling person who is like an ass carrying a load of books.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Muhammad Zakariyya Kandhalvi: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Of course, a single verse of the Holy Qur'an or a hadith moves the faithful to good actions, but …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, islam, books pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: Of course, a single verse of the Holy Qur'an or a hadith moves the faithful to good actions, but volumes of books would not move an unwilling person who is like an ass carrying a load of books.
